question: What kinds of datasets do you sell?
answer: We offer premium time-series datasets covering **energy markets** (oil, gas, electricity prices), **commodity prices** (metals, agricultural goods), and **financial market indicators**. All datasets span multiple years of monthly data.

question: What formats can I download data in?
answer: Every dataset is available in four formats: **XLSX** (Excel), **CSV** (universal), **PDF** (formatted report), and **PNG** (chart image). You get all formats with every purchase — no extras needed.

question: Do I need an account to purchase?
answer: Yes, a free account is required to complete a purchase and access your downloads. Registration takes under a minute — just email, name, and password.

question: How much do datasets cost?
answer: Each dataset has its own one-time price, typically ranging from a few hundred to a few thousand rupees depending on depth and coverage. Prices are shown in your selected currency with live exchange rates.

question: What currencies are supported?
answer: We support **8 currencies**: INR, USD, EUR, GBP, PKR, SAR, AED, and JPY. Prices update automatically via live exchange rates. You can change your display currency from the ⚙️ Settings button in the top navigation.

question: Is this a subscription service?
answer: **No.** ARW Analytics uses a **one-time purchase** model. Pay once, download immediately, and keep lifetime access to your data. There are no recurring fees, no annual renewals.

question: How do I access my purchases after buying?
answer: After purchase, go to **My Purchases** in your account menu. Each purchased dataset will have a Download button — click it to choose your preferred format and download instantly.

question: How frequently is data updated?
answer: Data is updated on a **monthly basis** as new official data releases become available. When you purchase a dataset, you receive all updates to that dataset at no extra cost.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: Since datasets are digital downloads, refunds are evaluated case-by-case. If you believe there is a data quality issue or a billing error, please contact us and we will resolve it promptly.

question: What sectors do you cover?
answer: We currently cover **8+ sectors** including: oil & gas, electricity markets, coal, renewables, metals & mining, agricultural commodities, macro-economic indicators, and financial market data.

question: Are there any free resources?
answer: Yes! Our **Free Data** section offers freely accessible articles, reports, and downloadable PDFs on energy markets, commodity pricing, and economic data — no account required.

question: How do I download after purchasing?
answer: After purchase is confirmed, a secure download link is generated immediately. You can access it from your **Purchases** page at any time — there is no expiry on your access.

question: Is my payment secure?
answer: All payments are processed through **Razorpay**, a PCI DSS-compliant payment gateway used by thousands of Indian businesses. We do not store any card details on our servers.

question: Who is ARW Analytics?
answer: ARW Analytics is a data intelligence platform built to deliver high-quality business, sector, and industry datasets to professionals, researchers, and enterprises worldwide. Our team of three covers technology, data research, and finance.

question: How many data points do datasets have?
answer: Each dataset shows its data point count on the catalog and detail pages. Most datasets contain **several years** worth of monthly observations. You can see a free 5-row preview on every dataset detail page before buying.

question: Can I use the data commercially?
answer: Yes, purchased datasets come with a **commercial license** for internal business use — reports, models, and dashboards. Redistribution or reselling of the raw data is not permitted. Full terms are in our Terms of Service.

question: Where does the data come from?
answer: Our data is sourced from **official government publications, regulatory agencies, international organizations** (e.g., IEA, World Bank, OPEC), and verified industry benchmarks. Sources are cited in each dataset's detail page.

question: Do you have energy price data?
answer: Yes — energy data is our primary focus. We have historical and current data on **crude oil prices, natural gas, electricity tariffs, coal prices, and renewable energy indicators** across multiple geographies.

question: Can I request a custom dataset?
answer: Absolutely. If you need a specific data series, geographic scope, or time range not currently in our catalog, reach out via our Contact page. We handle custom data research requests.

question: How do I change my display currency?
answer: Click the ⚙️ **Settings** icon in the top navigation bar. A modal will open where you can choose from 8 currencies. Your selection is saved and prices across the site update instantly.
